prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UPD-DISNEYPLUSH-10800B-PLUTO-HPNR Product Type: TOY_FIGURE Brand (from catalog): Mickey Mouse Existing Title: Mickey and The Roadster Racers Classic Bean Plush - Pluto Description: These small Mickey and the Roadster Racers plush characters are classics to treasure. Perfect size to bring along on all your adventures or bring the Roadster experience home. Collect them all. ​​​​​Ages 3+
Pluto measures 9" and features soft, plush material, a green collar and a bean bag bottom. Search Terms: (none) Features: - A soft and lovable Pluto plush to cuddle with you. Add to your collection! - Recommended for Pluto fans ages 2 and up. - Includes (1) Pluto 9 inch bean bag plush. Collect them all! - Made of super soft and huggable plush materials. - Collect all of the Mickey & Friends plushes for a full set! Mickey, Minnie, Goofy, Donald and Pluto. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Mickey Mouse Pluto 9 inch Classic Bean Plush Toy

anthropic.title_differentiation: Soft Plush Material, Green Collar, Bean Bag Bottom, Ages 3 Plus, Collectible Figure

openai.title_differentiation: Soft Plush Material, Bean Bag Bottom, 9" Collectible, Ages 2 And Up, Collect All Mickey And Friends Characters
